# Bankruptcy Denied? - What to Do Next [2026]
> Was your bankruptcy denied or dismissed? Learn the common reasons, how to appeal, and how to refile successfully. 2026 guide.

## About
bankruptcydenied.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Bad Faith Bankruptcy Filing - What It Means: https://bankruptcydenied.com/bad-faith-filing.html
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy Denial - Why Cases Get Dismissed: https://bankruptcydenied.com/chapter-7-denial.html
- Bankruptcy Denial FAQ: https://bankruptcydenied.com/faq.html
- Fraud and Concealment in Bankruptcy - Discharge Denial: https://bankruptcydenied.com/fraud-concealment.html
- Incomplete Paperwork - When Bankruptcy Is Dismissed for Missing Documents: https://bankruptcydenied.com/incomplete-paperwork.html
- Bankruptcy Denied? - What to Do Next: https://bankruptcydenied.com/
- Means Test Failure - What Happens If You Fail: https://bankruptcydenied.com/means-test-failure.html
- Prior Bankruptcy Dismissal - How It Affects Your New Case: https://bankruptcydenied.com/prior-dismissal.html
- What to Do If Your Bankruptcy Is Denied or Dismissed: https://bankruptcydenied.com/what-to-do-if-denied.html
- Privacy Policy: https://bankruptcydenied.com/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
